bioanchor 0.1.0

    • Getting Started with BioAnchor

Upload Metadata to Arweave

Source: R/arweave.R
upload_to_arweave.Rd

Uploads a JSON-serialized metadata object to the Arweave permaweb via the standard transaction API.

Usage

upload_to_arweave(
  metadata,
  jwk_path,
  gateway = "https://ar-io.dev",
  tags = NULL,
  dry_run = FALSE
)

Arguments

metadata

A bioanchor_metadata object (from extract_metadata()).

jwk_path

Path to an Arweave JWK wallet file.

gateway

Arweave gateway URL. Default uses ar-io.dev (recommended over arweave.net for reliability).

tags

A named character vector of additional Arweave transaction tags.

dry_run

If TRUE, serialize and validate but do not actually upload.

Value

A list with tx_id (transaction ID) and url (gateway URL).

Details

Gateway note: ar-io.dev is the recommended gateway. The legacy arweave.net gateway is known to be unstable.

Wallet: You need an Arweave JWK wallet file with sufficient AR balance. See https://arweave.org for wallet creation.

On this page
